title: Creación y fomento de redes forestales y agrícolas para impulsar la adopción de tecnologías de base biológica y el desarrollo de la cadena de valor
description: A project promoting the creation of regional forestry and agricultural networks to foster adoption of bio-based technologies and develop sustainable value chains. It supports stakeholder engagement, knowledge transfer, and co-design of local solutions to enhance circular bioeconomy practices across European regions.
